task_description: Fix browser zoom and system display scaling compatibility. The app currently uses fixed px values for html font-size and sidebar widths, preventing proper scaling when users zoom in/out with Ctrl+/Ctrl- or change OS display scaling. Convert to rem/percentage units so all elements scale uniformly.

verification.summary: Build passes successfully. All 430 tests pass. No px-based font-size remains in globals.css. No px-based widths in sidebar components. CSS changes are purely visual/scaling changes that don't require new test coverage - existing tests confirm no regressions.
